evidence_quotes.quote: This initiative calls on video game publishers to cease disabling access to games that customers have already bought.

paragraphs.text: I would like to express my support for this initiative and propose that it incorporate the objectives of the Stop Killing Games campaign. This initiative calls on video game publishers to cease disabling access to games that customers have already bought. It primarily affects games with online features. The campaign urges developers to maintain the games in a playable condition once support has concluded. This would allow players to continue enjoying the games theyve purchased, even after official support is no longer available.
